title: Phoenix endpoint: stop
description: Completion of an HTTP request handled by a Phoenix/Plug endpoint. One event per request. Emitted by Honeybadger.Insights.Plug, which subscribes to the Plug.Telemetry :stop event.

controller.description: Phoenix controller module name. Present when route_type is "controller".

action.description: Controller action name. Present when route_type is "controller".

live_view.description: LiveView module name. Present when route_type is "live".

live_action.description: LiveView action atom. Present when route_type is "live".

request_id.description: Request ID set from the x-request-id response header or assigns. Present on all events fired within a request context.
